name: vertex-ai-models-chat-provider
displayName: Google Agent Platform for Copilot Chat (Vertex AI Models Chat Provider)
description: Native Gemini, Claude & open-weight models, powered by Google Agent Platform (Vertex AI) for Copilot Chat

commands.title: Vertex AI Models Chat Provider: Dump Installed Tools Schema
Vertex AI Models Chat Provider: Refresh Models
Vertex AI Models Chat Provider: Generate Commit Message
Vertex AI: Paste Service Account JSON Key
Vertex AI: Select Service Account JSON File
Vertex AI: Clear Authentication Method (Use ADC)

vertexAiChat.projectId.description: GCP Project ID to use with Vertex AI. Models and regions are auto-discovered.

vertexAiChat.retryMaxDurationMinutes.description: Maximum retry duration in minutes for transient API failures such as 429 or 503.

vertexAiChat.hideBillingWarning.description: Hide the Estimated Costs warning banner on the Usage Dashboard.

vertexAiChat.enableUserLabel.description: Include a user identifier as a 'vscode-vertex-ai-user' label in Vertex AI calls. Values are automatically sanitized to meet GCP label requirements (lowercase, numbers, hyphens, underscores).

vertexAiChat.userLabelValue.description: Custom value for the user label. If empty, the name is derived automatically from the active identity. Values are automatically sanitized to meet GCP label requirements (lowercase, numbers, hyphens, underscores).

vertexAiChat.enableProjectLabel.description: Include the current VS Code project name as a 'vscode-vertex-ai-project' label in Vertex AI calls. Values are automatically sanitized to meet GCP label requirements.

vertexAiChat.projectLabelValue.description: Custom value for the project label. If empty, the name is derived automatically. Values are automatically sanitized to meet GCP label requirements.

scripts.preversion: npm run compile && npm run lint
